name: Grilled Chicken Taco Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup purchased reduced-calorie French dressing,  see note
4 boned and skinned chicken breast halves
1 cup reduced fat Cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
DRESSING: In a small bowl, combine all dressing ingredients; blend well. Refrigerate until serving time.
GRILL DIRECTIONS:
1. Heat grill.
2. Place 1 chicken breast half between 2 pieces of plastic wrap or waxed paper. Working from the center, gently pound the chicken with the flat side of a meat mallet or rolling pin until about 1/4 inch thick. Remove the wrap. Repeat with remaining chicken breast halves.
3. Sprinkle the chicken with chili powder and garlic powder.
4. When ready to grill, place the chicken on gas grill over medium heat or on charcoal grill 4 to 6 inches from medium-high coals. Cook for 5 to 10 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender and juices run clear, turning once.
5. Arrange lettuce, tomatoes, and cheese on 4 individual salad plates.
6. Cut the chicken crosswise into slices; place over the lettuce mixture.
7. Arrange tortilla chips around the edge of each plate.
8. Drizzle dressing over each salad; top with sour cream.
BROILER DIRECTIONS:
Prepare recipe as directed above. Place chicken on a broiler pan. Broil 4 to 6 inches from heat for 5 to 10 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender and juices run clear, turning once. Continue as directed above.
